{{Missing Info|specifics=<br>'''Fl.228''' rewards<br>'''Fl.3,974''' rewards<br>'''Fl.6,111''' rewards}}

==Fissure==
The Fissure is unlocked by purchasing the {{RewardIconWithText|Underground Explorer}} with {{RewardIconWithText|Yamato INTEL}} in [[Yamato_INTEL|Yamato]]. {{RewardIconWithText|Golden Pickaxe}}s are used to dig deeper and deeper into the Fissure, occasionally discovering an event consisting of combat, dungeons, rewards, or solvable incidents. As each floor is completed and rewards are collected, the Drill Rig will be updated to produce more items.

==Golden Pickaxe==
The {{RewardIconWithText|Golden Pickaxe}} is used exclusively for digging within the Fissure. Every pickaxe is good for 5 hits within the fissure before breaking.

{| class="wikitable"
!Source
!Chance/Price
!Pickaxes Gained
|-
|[[Arena Shop]]||800 {{RewardIconWithText|Punch Points}}||+3 per reset
|-
|[[Exploration]]||Very low chance||+1
|-
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Demon Chest}}||15% chance||+1
|-
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Dragon Chest}}||15% chance||+1
|-
|[[Fissure Shop]]||Can randomly appear<br>150 {{RewardIconWithText|Ancient Coin}}||+1 per purchase
|-
|[[Lottery_Machine#Balloon_Battle_Rewards|Lottery Week Balloon Battle]]||1.5k {{RewardIconWithText|Carnival Balloon}}||+6
|-
|[[Museum Shop]] item {{RewardIconWithText|Curator's Collection}}||High Chance<br>1k {{RewardIconWithText|Museum Medal}}||+1 per purchase
|-
|[[Altar#Crystal_Boom_Rewards|Offering Week Crystal Boom]]||3k {{RewardIconWithText|Spirit Crystal}}||+12
|-
|Partner [[Adviser Zhuge]] Rare Rent||Random chance||+1
|-
|[[Salesman]]||Random chance<br>8k {{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad}}||+1
|-
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Super Memetic Chest}}||User choice||+20 per reset
|-
|[[Alchemy_Furnace#Wish_Magic|Wishing Week Wish Magic]]||20 and 30 Wish Points||+3 for 20 and 30 each, +6 per round, or +30 for all 5 rounds
|}

==Fissure Shop==
The Fissure's Shop is unlocked after completing Fissure Fl. 17. It refreshes every 72 hours and is on the same timer as the [[Arena#Arena_Shop|Arena Shop]], [[Club#Club_Shop|Club Shop]], and [[Museum#Museum_Shop|Museum Shop]]. 

{{RewardIconWithText|Ancient Coin}}s are gathered from using {{RewardIconWithLink|Golden Pickaxe|orange}}, the Drill Rig, and can be purchased using {{RewardIconWithText|W-tads}} in the shop itself.

A random assortment of items shows up after ever reset. The pool of available items are listed below.

{{ShopRowHeader|Fissure Shop|Ancient Coin|collapsed}}
!rowspan="10"|Cells
{{ShopRow|Angel Cell, +3k|green|250|Angel Cell, +9k|green|750|Angel Cell, +15k|green|1,250}}
{{ShopRow|Demon Cell, +3k|green|250|Demon Cell, +9k|green|750|Demon Cell, +15k|green|1,250}}
{{ShopRow|Mecha Cell, +3k|green|250|Mecha Cell, +9k|green|750|Mecha Cell, +15k|green|1,250}}
{{ShopRow|Mutant Cell, +3k|green|250|Mutant Cell, +9k|green|750|Mutant Cell, +15k|green|1,250}}
{{ShopRow|Zombie Cell, +3k|green|250|Zombie Cell, +9k|green|750|Zombie Cell, +15k|green|1,250}}
!rowspan="2"|Chests
{{ShopRow|Fungus Chest, +100|orange|400|Organ Chest, +100|orange|400|Time Chest, +100|orange|400}}
!rowspan="2"|Coating
{{ShopRow|Green Coating, +100|green|50|Blue Coating, +100|blue|500|Purple Coating, +40|purple|2k}}
!rowspan="8"|Currency
{{ShopRow|B-Tads, +50k|white|200|B-Tads, +100k|white|400|Glue, +30|white|250}}
{{ShopRow|Toner, +20|white|100|Toner, +40|white|200|Dragon Orb, +1|orange|1.8k}}
{{ShopRow|Golden Pickaxe, +1|orange|150|Incense, +1|orange|750|Lottery Ticket, +3|orange|450}}
{{ShopRow|Lottery Ticket, +6|orange|900|Wish Coin, +1|orange|300|Wish Coin, +2|orange|600}}

!rowspan="4"|Gene Segment<br>500
{{ShopRow|Copperbeard Gene Segment, +5<br>Reach Depth ?|white|500|Mammoth Gene Segment, +5<br>Reach Depth ?|white|500|Smilodon Gene Segment, +5<br>Reach Depth 650|white|500}}
{{ShopRow|Bone Demon Gene Segment, +1<br>Reach Depth 2000<br>(Need to buy 5 times)|white|500}}

!rowspan="4"|Gene Segment<br>1k
{{ShopRow|Belrog Gene Segment, +5<br>Reach Depth 1440|white|1k|Cave Lord Gene Segment, +5<br>Reach Depth 2895|white|1k|Dark Elf Gene Segment, +5<br>Reach Depth 1500|white|1k}}
{{ShopRow|Headless Rider Gene Segment, +5<br>Reach Depth 2000|white|1k|Seer Beetle Gene Segment, +5<br>Reach Depth 2400|white|1k}}

!rowspan="4"|Gene Segment<br>1.5k
{{ShopRow|Earth Dragon Gene Segment, +5<br>Reach Depth ?|white|1.5k|Mantis Monk Gene Segment, +5<br>Reach Depth ?|white|1.5k|Skulllizard Gene Segment, +5<br>Reach Depth 4000|white|1.5k}}
{{ShopRow|Skullord Gene Segment, +5<br>Reach Depth 5000|white|+1.5k|Underground King Gene Segment, +5<br>Reach Depth 8000|white|1.5k|White Demon Gene Segment, +5<br>Reach Depth 3500|white|1.5k}}

!rowspan="4"|Gene Segment<br>2k
{{ShopRow|Blakadin MKIV Gene Segment, +5<br>Reach Depth 13000|white|2k|Evil Omen Gene Segment, +5<br>Reach Depth ?|white|2k|Gulpetal Tyrant Gene Segment, +5<br>Reach Depth ?|white|2k}}
{{ShopRow|Tsarjaw Gene Segment, +5<br>Reach Depth ?|white|2k|Venustoad Gene Segment, +5<br>Reach Depth ?|white|2k}}

!rowspan="6"|Material Gear
{{ShopRow|Black Pearl, +1|green|25|Sorcerer Ring, +1|green|25|Warrior Ring, +1|green|25}}
{{ShopRow|White Pearl, +1|green|25|Ruby Brooch, +1|blue|150|Sapphire Brooch, +1|blue|150}}
{{ShopRow|Abyss Amulet, +1|purple|600|Heaven Amulet, +1|purple|600}}
!rowspan="2"|Reagent
{{ShopRow|Green Reagent, +50|green|125|Blue Reagent, +50|blue|250|Purple Reagent, +50|purple|1k}}
!rowspan="6"|Scrolls
{{ShopRow|Novice Scroll, +10|blue|200|Novice Scroll, +20|blue|400|Expert Scroll, +10|purple|660}}
{{ShopRow|Expert Scroll, +20|purple|1,320|Master Scroll, +10|orange|900|Master Scroll, +20|orange|1.8k}}
{{ShopRow|Master Scroll, +40|orange|3.6k}}
!rowspan="2"|Unlocks
{{ShopRow|Mysterious Seed, +1|white|500}}
|}

===Supply Boxes===
Supply Boxes can be for sale in the Fissure Shop as well. Some Boxes can only show up once and will be at the top of the screen. Others will randomly be placed with the rest of the items in the shop.

'''Supply Boxes that can be bought once:'''
{| class="wikitable mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"
!Supply Box Name
!Cost in<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Ancient Coin}}s
!Prerequisite
!Contents
|-
|{{RewardIconWithText|Limited Value Pack I|orange}}||500||Unlocked with Fissure Shop||{{RewardIconWithLink|Lottery Ticket, +8|orange}}<br>{{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad, +30k}}<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Green Reagent, +100|green}}
|-
|{{RewardIconWithText|Limited Value Pack II|orange}}||1k||Unlocked with Fissure Shop||{{RewardIconWithLink|Wish Coin, +5|orange}}<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Golden Pickaxe, +2|orange}}<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Glue, +30}}
|-
|{{RewardIconWithText|Eye of Horus Pack|orange}}||25k||Unlocked with Fissure Shop||{{RewardIconWithLink|Eye of Horus|orange}}<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Glue, +100}}<br>{{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad, +60k}}
|-
|{{RewardIconWithText|Heaven Amulet Pack|orange}}||900||Unlocked after purchasing Limited Value Pack I||{{RewardIconWithLink|Heaven Amulet|purple}}<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Glue, +100}}<br>{{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad, +24k}}
|-
|{{RewardIconWithText|Abyss Amulet Pack|orange}}||900||Unlocked after purchasing Limited Value Pack II||{{RewardIconWithLink|Abyss Amulet|purple}}<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Glue, +100}}<br>{{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad, +24k}}
|-
|{{RewardIconWithText|Crystal of Will Pack|orange}}||50k||Unlocked after purchasing Eye of Horus Pack||{{RewardIconWithLink|Crystal of Will|orange}}<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Glue, +200}}<br>{{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad, +120k}}<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Wish Coin, +8|orange}}
|}

'''Random Supply Boxes:'''
{| class="wikitable mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"
!Supply Box Name
!Cost in<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Ancient Coin}}s
!Contents
|-
|{{RewardIconWithText|Supervalue Pack I|orange}}||300||{{RewardIconWithLink|Lottery Ticket, +1|orange}}<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Golden Pickaxe, +1|orange}}<br>{{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad, +30k}}
|-
|{{RewardIconWithText|Supervalue Pack II|orange}}||500||{{RewardIconWithLink|Wish Coin, +1|orange}}<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Expert Scroll, +10|purple}}<br>{{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad, +50k}}
|-
|{{RewardIconWithText|White Gear Pack I|orange}}||600||{{RewardIconWithLink|Flower Crown}} +10<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Glue, +10}}<br>{{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad, +50k}}
|-
|{{RewardIconWithText|White Gear Pack II|orange}}||600||{{RewardIconWithLink|Wooden Ring}} +10<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Glue, +10}}<br>{{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad, +50k}}
|-
|{{RewardIconWithText|White Gear Pack III|orange}}||600||{{RewardIconWithLink|Iron Ring}} +10<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Glue, +10}}<br>{{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad, +50k}}
|-
|{{RewardIconWithText|White Gear Pack IV|orange}}||600||{{RewardIconWithLink|Beast Fang}} +10<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Glue, +10}}<br>{{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad, +50k}}
|}

==Drill Rig==
{{RewardIcon|Drill Rig Core|50}}

The Drill Rig is unlocked after completing Fissure Fl. 22 and will automatically dig for rewards every 72 hours. After each Fissure floor is completed the Drill Rig will be able to produce more {{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad}}, reagent, scrolls, and {{RewardIconWithLink|Ancient Coin}} (Fissure currency).

==Fissure Digging Log==

===Legend===
{|class=wikitable
!Type
!Color Assignment
|-
|Combat
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|
|-
|Dungeon
|style="background-color:var(--orange-bg)"|
|-
|Fissure Incident
|style="background-color:var(--yellow-bg)"|
|-
|Reward
|style="background-color:var(--blue-bg)"|
|}

<tabber>
|-|0-199=
{| class="wikitable"
!Floor!!Name!!Notes!!Snail Reward!!Drill Rig Reward
|-

|style="background-color:var(--blue-bg)"|Dangerous Mine
|
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Claymore Mine|green}}
|style="text-align:center"| -
|-
|5
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|Underground Pipe
|Defeat [[#Fissure Enemies|City Administrator]]
|{{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad, +4k}}<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Novice Scroll, +10|blue}}
|{{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad, +5k}}

|733

|-
